series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to complaints that the Division of Industrial Compliance receives involving alleged violations of Chapter 4781 of the Ohio Revised Code or Chapters 4781-6, 4781-7, 4781-8, 4781-9, and 4781-12 of the Ohio Administrative Code. This record series includes, but it not limited to, complaints, documentation received with a complaint, complaint inspection reports, inspection report photos, violation acknowledgment forms, proof of corrections, and extension requests.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist, then the paper record shall be destroyed three years after the complaint was opened. ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after the complaint was opened., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
